title: Client: Encrypted local message history
description:
Messages are not stored locally. If the relay purges the queue (72h TTL) or the client crashes, messages are lost. There is no read history.

Required:
- SQLite database in data_dir (e.g. history.db)
- Encrypted with sqlcipher OR plaintext SQLite + age-encrypted file (simpler)
- Schema: messages(id, from, to, timestamp, payload_cleartext, direction)
- Append on send (before relay confirms) and on receive
- CLI: nie log [peer] to show history
- Key derived from identity key, not a separate passphrase (transparent to user)
